RSSB LDC / Junior Assistant Primary Answer Key 2026
tables: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB LDC / Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 Primary Answer Key

Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB RSMSSB has released the LDC / Junior Assistant Notification 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this Rajasthan LDC / Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 Exam can Apply Online from 15 January 2026 to 13 February 2026. Read the notification for RSSSB LDC / Jr. Assistant Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.
Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Recruitment 2026 RSSB Advt No. 04/2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 15/01/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 13/02/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 13/02/2026 Exam Date : 05 July 2026 Exam City Available : 26/06/2026 Admit Card Available : 01/07/2026
Application Fee General / OBC: 600/- OBC NCL / SC / ST : 400/- Correction Fee : 300/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking
RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Recruitment Rules.
RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details Total : 10644 Post
LDC / Junior Assistant TSP : 1002 Post Non TSP : 9642 Post

10+2 Passed from Any Recognized Board/University in India O Level / COPA / Degree / Diploma / Certificate in Computer Science / Application / 10+2 with Computer Subject / Diploma in Computer Science Polytechnic / RSCIT. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Exam 2026 : Post Wise Vacancy Details

How to Fill RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Recruitment Online Form 2026 RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 15/01/2026 to 13/02/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RSSB LDC / Jr Assistant Recruitment 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
